paths.notes: This file itself. Only writable by `code-architect owners bootstrap` or `owners migrate`; never a general edit target.
Config dir for CA-managed lockfiles + contracts. Run.lock is handled atomically by safe-json; humans review anything else.
Nami runtime SQLite plus -wal/-shm sidecars. Gitignored anyway, but explicit policy prevents accidental writes through any tooling. Touching sidecars corrupts the DB.
User uploads. Gitignored; runtime only.
pytest tree (test_bridge.py, test_bridge_intents.py, etc). Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated.
FastAPI router code (bridge.py, api.py, auth.py, client.py, dashboard.py, inbox.py, monitoring.py, publish.py, review.py). API contract surface; never bypass-eligible.
Business-logic services. Humans review.
One-shot scripts (seed_*, backfill_*, check_*). Often dangerous (DB writes, calendar resets); humans review.
Jinja templates for client-facing UI. Humans review.
Static web assets served to clients. Humans review.
Bundled application assets. Humans review.
FastAPI app entry, router mounts, lifecycle. Humans review every change.
App settings + env var bindings. Humans review.
DB schema + connection management. Humans review schema changes.
Python deps. Humans review additions/removals.
Template/scaffold project. Not production. Nami's domain; CA never writes.
Nami's runtime memory. Gitignored; per-developer ephemeral state.
External dev tooling. Gitignored; not part of production app.
Render.com deploy config. Deploy-pipeline; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory.
Litestream SQLite-replication config. Backup-pipeline; humans review.
CI/CD workflows. Deploy-pipeline; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory. Defensive entry — no .github/workflows exists today.

fallback.notes: Default-deny posture: anything not matched above (top-level CLAUDE.md/nami-audit.txt/build_facebook_cover.py/loose PNGs, docs/, nami-platform/docs/) requires human review.
